description:
You are a bioinformatics scientist analyzing urine metabolite profiles from cancer patients to identify biomarkers associated with Cachexia (muscle wasting syndrome). Perform a differential abundance analysis on the dataset located at /home/ga/RProjects/datasets/human_cachexia.csv to compare 'Cachexic' and 'Control' groups found in the Muscle.wasting column.

The analysis requires Log2-transformed concentration values with any missing data imputed using half of the minimum positive value for that specific metabolite. Use Welch's t-test and Benjamini-Hochberg FDR correction to determine statistical significance.

Save the statistical results to /home/ga/RProjects/output/metabolomics_results.csv. This file must include the metabolite name, log2 fold change (calculated as the difference between group means), raw p-value, FDR, and a significance indicator (FDR < 0.05). Additionally, generate a Volcano Plot showing log2 fold change versus -log10 p-value, with points colored by significance, and save it to /home/ga/RProjects/output/volcano_plot.png. Use the starter script at /home/ga/RProjects/cachexia_analysis.R to perform the task.
